rationale: Iteration 001 wins 2 of 4 judged evals (003-London zoom, 009-DC detail), ties 1 (010-Florida), loses 1 (002-Paris). The London zoom improvement is decisive — baseline showed all of England at 800km, iter-001 correctly shows Greater London metro. The Paris regression is due to a navigation help tooltip appearing, not a skill quality issue. No critical regressions. Net improvement.

eval-002.note: Help tooltip visible in candidate, zoom slightly wider

eval-003.note: Unanimous. Baseline 800km altitude showed all England; candidate correctly zoomed to London metro

eval-009.note: Better street detail, cleaner UI without timeline

eval-010.note: Unanimous tie. Alert overlay identical quality

hypotheses_validated.H1_widget_cleanup: Partially validated. Timeline/animation removed successfully. But navigation help tooltip appeared as unintended side effect.
hypotheses_validated.H2_setView_vs_flyTo: Validated. Camera positions consistent and immediate.
hypotheses_validated.H3_altitude_guidance: Strongly validated. Eval-003 London zoom dramatically improved from 800km to metro scale.

next_iteration_notes: Suppress the navigation help tooltip (navigationInstructionsInitiallyVisible: false). Consider tightening Paris zoom guidance.
